projects.title: Rakshak AI - Intelligent Disaster Response System
projects.description: An AI-powered disaster detection and response system using machine learning and NLP. Real-time map visualization with location-based alerts and an intelligent chatbot for disaster awareness.
features: ML/NLP disaster detection from news and social media
Live map visualization of disaster zones
Disaster awareness chatbot powered by LLMs

projects.title: HealthMate - Family Health Tracking System
projects.description: A comprehensive family health management application for tracking vaccinations, monitoring health metrics and appointments with timely reminders.

projects.title: FurBuddy - Pet Care & Community Platform
projects.description: A comprehensive pet care and community platform integrating pet adoption, donation, matchmaking, healthcare discovery, and community interaction into a user-friendly application.
features: Pet mate finder for responsible breeding
Real-time community chat for pet owners
Nearby veterinary hospitals and care centers discovery

projects.title: Minimum Cost Path Finder – Algorithm Visualizer
projects.description: An interactive GUI visualizer for graph shortest-path algorithms. Designed to improve conceptual understanding through real-time graph rendering and dynamic path highlighting. Built with Python and Tkinter for an intuitive learning experience.
features: Dynamic path highlighting for shortest paths
